HGSS.456.0000:
...Yeah, and the Gym in Cinnabar’s
gone. I was really amazed.\f
...Yes? I’m on the phone.
Go away!
HGSS.456.0002:
Most Pokémon get drowsy if they
hear a JIGGLYPUFF singing.\f
There are several moves that can be
used only while a Pokémon is asleep.
HGSS.456.0003:
Aw...
If only I had a HAUNTER...\f
If you have a HAUNTER,
you will trade it for my XATU,\r
won’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.456.0004:
How wonderful! You made my day!\f
Thanks to you, I have finally got the
Pokémon I’ve been looking for...\r
since forever!
HGSS.456.0005:
It has to be a HAUNTER!\f
HAUNTER!!
HGSS.456.0006:
You’d never turn down a trade
if you had a HAUNTER.\f
That means you just don’t have one.
That must be it...
HGSS.456.0007:
How do you like the cool XATU
I traded you?\f
It’s so cool, because it used to be
with cool me!
